tiktok.caption: Your financial advisor can legally pocket your money and it's 100% allowed. Here's the one word that changes everything 🚨

youtube_short.title: Your Financial Advisor Isn't Legally On Your Side
title_alternatives: The $17 Billion Advisor Loophole Nobody Tells You About
Only 15% of Financial Advisors Are Required to Help You
youtube_short.description: Most Americans don't realize their financial advisor has zero legal obligation to act in their best interest. There are two standards: fiduciary (legally required to put you first) and suitability (just can't be obviously wrong for you). Only 15% of advisors are fiduciaries — the rest can legally pocket 7% commissions on products that cost you thousands. The Department of Labor found this costs Americans $17 billion every single year. Just 1% in hidden fees destroys $187,000 in growth on $100K over 30 years. Ask your advisor today: 'Are you a fiduciary?' #personalfinance #investing #financialadvisor Follow for daily money psychology breakdowns.

hook_line: Your advisor can legally work against you
